description_long: This upright piano features a weathered, white-painted wooden exterior with subtle stains and signs of age, giving it a vintage urban character. The front displays a full keyboard with alternating black and white keys, and a music sheet rests on a simple music stand above the keys. Decorative gold accents are present on the side panels, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise utilitarian design. The matching bench has a cushioned brown seat and shares the same distressed white finish as the piano. The back panel is plain except for the initials 'E.B.' inscribed in gold at the lower right corner. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, solid wood frame with metal internal components typical of upright pianos.
description: A vintage upright piano with a distressed white finish, gold accents, and a matching cushioned bench. The piano features a full keyboard, music stand, and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, music stand with sheet music, and the matching cushioned bench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's depth, gold decorative accents, and the bench's position relative to the piano.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with the 'E.B.' inscription in gold at the lower right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same gold decorative accents and the bench, mirroring the other side.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with 52 white keys and 36 black keys arranged in the traditional pattern, no missing or non-standard keys.
